query:
SELECT
                b.id,
                b.owner_id,
                b.title,
                b.description,
                JSONB_AGG(
                    JSONB_BUILD_OBJECT(
                        'id', m.id,
                        'user_id', m.user_id,
                        'role', m.role
                    )
                ) AS "members!: Json<Vec<BoardMemberDb>>"
            FROM boards b
            INNER JOIN board_members m ON b.id = m.board_id
            WHERE b.owner_id = $1 OR EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM board_members bm
            WHERE bm.board_id = b.id
            AND bm.user_id = $1
            )
            GROUP BY b.id, b.owner_id, b.title, b.description
